existing_features.title: Remove the light/dark mode toggle from the UI so users cannot switch themes from within the app.
Make the app render in dark styling by default on every load (independent of system theme preference and any previously stored theme), using the existing Tailwind class-based dark theme variables.
Remove or retire client-side theme persistence/toggling logic that is no longer needed after enforcing always-on dark styling.

new_feature_requests.summary: Use an overall dark styling/theme and omit any dark mode toggle.

projectName: Remove theme toggle and enforce always-on dark styling
